title: Enriching Blaze Powder
description: Nether-free Method of aquiring Blaze Powder
body:
A super-simple mod that adds a smelting recipe to turn Redstone Blocks into Blaze Powder, and a crafting recipe to turn 3 Blaze Powder in a vertical line to create a Blaze Rod.

 

My custom maps don't use the Nether, but I wanted a method to brew potions. This seemed like a balanced way to get it.
